title: Think You Know What Apple Will Do Next? Prove It and You Could Win an Apple Watch
summary: Apple’s Worldwide Developers Conference arrives June 8, and the 50-year-old tech giant finds itself in the middle of significant changes, as CEO Tim Cook will soon turn over the reins to John Ternus . Apple Watch is a trademark of Apple Inc.
